title: Obvious Shriekers
description: A very, very, very simple resource pack that increases the size of shriekers and makes them bright white.
body:
A very simple resource pack that makes shriekers larger than normal blocks & bright white.
![shrieker in sculk biome](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b040a687dab08fb597736246e2644e27479a97b8.png)
